Whole grains for a gentle infusion.
Wash well. They quickly turn bitter.

vodka-infusion-frutas-tiempo.Pelar si es necesario. Probar a los 7 dí: Peel if necessary. Taste at 7 days.
vodka-infusion-frutas-tiempo.Probar diariamente. Enseguida se pone mu: Taste daily. It quickly becomes very spicy.

Do not exceed 40 mg/day long term.
